Title: Open employee profile edit page
Precondition: User is logged in and has profile access
Steps: Navigate to Employee Profile > Edit Profile
Expected Result: Edit profile page opens with current details populated

Title: Update employee first and last name
Steps: Change First Name and Last Name, then click Save
Expected Result: Updated name is saved and displayed on profile summary

Title: Update phone number with valid format
Steps: Enter valid phone number 9876543210 and save
Expected Result: Phone number is accepted and saved

Title: Update email with valid format
Steps: Enter employee.qa@example.com and save
Expected Result: Email is accepted and saved

Title: Update address field
Steps: Update address line, city, state, and ZIP code, then save
Expected Result: Address details are saved correctly

Title: Update designation
Steps: Change designation to Senior QA Engineer and save
Expected Result: Designation is updated and visible in profile

Title: Update multiple profile fields together
Steps: Update name, phone, address, and designation, then save
Expected Result: All updated values are saved correctly

Title: Required name field validation
Steps: Clear First Name and click Save
Expected Result: System displays required field validation message

Title: Required phone field validation
Steps: Clear Phone Number and click Save
Expected Result: System displays phone required validation message

Title: Required designation field validation
Steps: Clear Designation and click Save
Expected Result: System displays designation required validation message

Title: Invalid phone number with alphabets
Steps: Enter abcdefghij in Phone Number and click Save
Expected Result: System rejects input and displays valid phone format error

Title: Invalid phone number with less digits
Steps: Enter 12345 in Phone Number and click Save
Expected Result: System rejects short phone number

Title: Invalid phone number with special characters
Steps: Enter @#$%^& in Phone Number and click Save
Expected Result: System rejects special characters

Title: Invalid email missing @ symbol
Steps: Enter employee.example.com and click Save
Expected Result: System displays invalid email format error

Title: Invalid email missing domain
Steps: Enter employee@ and click Save
Expected Result: System rejects incomplete email

Title: Maximum length validation for name field
Steps: Enter more than 50 characters in First Name and save
Expected Result: System prevents or rejects excessive characters

Title: Maximum length validation for address field
Steps: Enter very long address text and save
Expected Result: System handles limit properly without UI break

Title: Cancel profile update
Precondition: Profile edit form has unsaved changes
Steps: Click Cancel
Expected Result: Changes are discarded and user returns to profile page

Title: Verify saved details after page refresh
Steps: Refresh profile page after save
Expected Result: Updated details remain saved after refresh

Title: Verify saved details after logout and login
Steps: Logout, login again, open profile
Expected Result: Updated details still display correctly

Title: Success message after valid update
Steps: Click Save with valid details
Expected Result: System displays clear success message

Title: Error message after invalid update
Steps: Enter invalid email and click Save
Expected Result: System displays clear error message near the invalid field

Title: Verify unauthorized user cannot edit another employee profile
Precondition: User is logged in with normal employee role
Steps: Attempt direct URL access to another employee edit page
Expected Result: Access is denied or redirected

Title: Verify existing profile data does not disappear
Precondition: Profile page contains existing employee data
Steps: Open edit page and click Save without changes
Expected Result: Existing data remains unchanged

Title: Verify labels and required markers are clear
Steps: Review form labels, required markers, and field hints
Expected Result: All fields have clear labels and required fields are marked
